semantic_description: Verifies scalar climb_stairs(n) for 0 <= n <= 45. The function returns 1 for n <= 1, otherwise runs a for loop from i = 2 through n maintaining two previous Fibonacci-style stair counts and returning the count defined by climb_stairs_z(n@pre). It uses only local integer variables, does not access or modify heap memory, and the bounded input serves as an overflow guard for int arithmetic.
